title: Fagelia stricta
taxonomy: Fagelia stricta is classified within the plant family Ericaceae. This family is commonly known as the heath or heather family, and it includes numerous shrubs and trees that thrive in acidic soils. Fagelia stricta is a genus of flowering plants endemic to New Caledonia. The classification of Fagelia stricta is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the division Magnoliophyta. Its classification also places it in the class Magnoliopsida, which includes flowering plants with a particular type of leaf arrangement.
